catalysts.description: SK Hynix Q1 2026 earnings. Watch gross margin and HBM4 mass production update — not just EPS. Key thesis confirmation event.
NVIDIA Q1 FY2027 earnings. Blackwell ramp pace, data centre revenue, and gross margin guidance.
Micron Q3 FY2026 earnings. HBM3E shipment volumes and NAND pricing outlook.
Marvell Q1 FY2027 earnings. Custom silicon design win pipeline and AI networking ramp.
Broadcom Q2 FY2026 earnings. XPU hyperscaler revenue and VMware integration progress.
Arista Networks Q1 2026 earnings. Data centre order book and hyperscaler capex guidance.
Eaton Q1 2026 earnings. Power management order backlog and data centre electrical segment.
Air Products Q2 FY2026 earnings. Hydrogen project update and CEO strategic review outcome.
Rheinmetall Q1 2026 earnings. Order intake from EU rearmament and NATO spending commitments.
ASE Technology Q1 2026 earnings. Advanced packaging capacity and HBM assembly volume.

risk_flags.title: APD: CEO Transition Risk
risk_flags.description: New CEO strategy review underway. Potential portfolio restructuring and hydrogen project delays. Monitor Q2 earnings for direction.

risk_flags.title: US Tariff Uncertainty
risk_flags.description: Elevated tariff risk affecting US-listed semiconductor names (NVDA, MU, MRVL, AVGO). Watch for supply chain disruption guidance in Q1 earnings.

behavioural_ledger.name: Engagement Bias
behavioural_ledger.description: Tendency to check positions and news far more frequently than the investment horizon warrants. H2/H3 positions do not need daily monitoring — repeated checking amplifies noise-driven anxiety and increases the risk of reacting to short-term volatility.
behavioural_ledger.notes: Most pronounced during earnings weeks. Reviewing SK Hynix and NVDA multiple times per day even when no new catalyst is expected.

behavioural_ledger.name: Execution Paralysis
behavioural_ledger.description: Hesitation to execute a planned trade even after the pre-trade checklist is complete and the thesis clearly supports the action. Manifests as waiting for 'one more data point' that never fully satisfies.
behavioural_ledger.notes: Observed when adding to RHM.DE position in February — checklist passed, decision was sound, but execution delayed 4 days with no new information arriving in that window.

behavioural_ledger.name: Trim Discipline
behavioural_ledger.description: Reluctance to trim positions that have grown beyond target weight, rationalised as 'the thesis is still intact'. Concentration risk accumulates when winners are never partially sold.
behavioural_ledger.notes: RHM.DE reached 28% portfolio weight in March. No trim executed despite the position sizing guideline at 25% target. Monitoring whether this breaches the 35% hard limit.

session_log.summary: Monthly review. Reviewed all positions against thesis, checked catalyst calendar for May–June, noted SK Hynix Q1 earnings imminent.
key_decisions: No new positions this month — cash is at 8%, below the 10% minimum buffer.
RHM.DE thesis remains intact despite broader defence sector correction.
Decided not to trim NVDA ahead of earnings — position weight at 22%, within guidelines.
action_items: Review SK Hynix Q1 earnings result on 2026-04-29 against HBM4 thesis milestones.
Recalculate Sparerpauschbetrag headroom after Q1 dividend income is confirmed.
Set a reminder to review APD thesis after new CEO Q2 strategy statement.

session_log.summary: Added fifth SK Hynix lot. Reviewed engagement bias pattern — reduced check-in frequency to once per week for H2/H3 positions.
key_decisions: Bought 10 shares of HY9H.F at €121.40 — pre-trade checklist passed, thesis intact.
Committed to weekly-only review cadence for SK Hynix and MU outside earnings windows.
action_items: Update lot ledger with new SK Hynix purchase.
Check FIFO lot ordering — fifth lot now oldest lot with lowest cost basis.

session_log.summary: Q1 portfolio review. Identified execution paralysis pattern after RHM.DE delay. No disposals made.
key_decisions: Acknowledged execution paralysis on RHM.DE add — documented here to track recurrence.
MTE.DE thesis intact — hydrogen infrastructure funding confirmed in EU budget.
No tax-loss harvesting opportunities — all positions in unrealised gain.
action_items: Set a hard rule: if checklist passes and no new material information arrives within 48h, execute.
Review MRVL position sizing — currently 9%, below 10% minimum meaningful allocation.

positions.thesis_notes: HBM4 mass production leader, 62% global HBM share, NVIDIA #1 supplier. Thesis confirmation: Q1 2026 earnings April 29 — watch gross margin, not just EPS.
